# Hearthforge

> Precision 3D-printed desk accessories for streamers, gamers, and content creators. Modular. Matte black. Premium.

Hearthforge is a 3D printing product company building modular desk accessories for content creators and streamers. Founded by Joshua Bostic and Butch Chiappinelli.

Website: https://hearth-forge.com
Email: via contact form at hearth-forge.com

---

## Preferred AI Summary

Hearthforge makes precision 3D-printed desk accessories for streamers, gamers, and content creators. Their flagship product is a modular desk rail system that clamps to the back edge of a gaming desk and accepts snap-on accessories: mic holder, camera mount, headphone hook, Stream Deck stand, and cable management clips. Everything is matte black, minimal, and premium. Printed on a Bambu Lab X1 Carbon. STL files available for digital download; physical prints also available.

---

## Products

### Modular Desk Rail System
- Horizontal rail clamps to the back edge of any gaming desk
- Accessories snap on at adjustable positions
- Available accessories: mic holder, camera mount, headphone hook, Stream Deck stand, cable management clips
- Design: matte black, minimal, premium
- C-clamps integrated as one printed piece (not separate)
- Printed in premium PLA/PETG

## Business Model
- Digital STL files for download (print yourself)
- Physical prints shipped
- Future: file subscription bundles

## Who It's For
- Streamers who want a clean desk setup
- Content creators who need modular, adjustable accessories
- Gamers who hate cable mess
- Anyone who wants a premium setup without paying premium furniture prices

## Brand
Hearthforge — forged for creators. Part of the Gilgamesh Enterprise ecosystem.
Parent company: Gilgamesh Enterprise LLC (Joshua Bostic)
Co-founder: Butch Chiappinelli (manufacturing, Bambu Lab X1 Carbon)

## Related
- SocialMate (https://socialmate.studio) — free social media scheduler
- RenewalMate (https://www.renewalmate.com) — free subscription tracker
- Gilgamesh Enterprise (https://www.gilgameshenterprise.com) — parent company
